final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing cover image for a Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) post announcing GPT-image-2 launch on Lovart platform.

Style/medium: needs a "高级杂志感" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Vogue Italia editorial spreads, Kinfolk minimalist typography tradition, 1990s i-D magazine cover design; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be diagonal framing
Subject: must include GPT-image-2 and Lovart as the focal subject matter
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs high-contrast accent direction — exact hex values and accent placement are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-image-2", "Lovart"
Constraints: must preserve diagonal composition, high-contrast accent treatment
Avoid:
